name: electron-launchpad-demo
description: Production-ready Electron demo powered by Vue 3, Vite, and a secure preload bridge.
author: Launchpad Team

scripts.dev:electron:main: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8066 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8066 node electron/launch.js .
scripts.pack:electron: npm run clean:electron && npm run prepare:electron-build && npm run build:web && cross-env ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache/electron-builder ELECTRON_CACHE=.cache/electron electron-builder --dir
scripts.pack:electron:cn: npm run clean:electron && npm run prepare:electron-build && npm run build:web && cross-env ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://registry.npmmirror.com/-/binary/electron-builder-binaries/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache/electron-builder ELECTRON_CACHE=.cache/electron electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist:electron: npm run clean:electron && npm run prepare:electron-build && npm run build:web && cross-env ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache/electron-builder ELECTRON_CACHE=.cache/electron electron-builder
scripts.dist:electron:cn: npm run clean:electron && npm run prepare:electron-build && npm run build:web && cross-env ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://registry.npmmirror.com/-/binary/electron-builder-binaries/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=.cache/electron-builder ELECTRON_CACHE=.cache/electron electron-builder
